public_safety.public_export_rule: High-level capability and workflow summary only; no private source records.

purpose: Create the first weekly-refresh baseline for Kevin's accumulated work, capability map, planning needs, current specs, and future outlook.

capability_nodes.label: AI / Codex operating system
capability_nodes.need: Turn Kevin's scattered work into repeatable prompts, checkpoints, artifacts, and reviewable outputs.
capability_nodes.current_spec: Agent OS routing, public artifact publishing flow, redaction scanner, schema validator, workboard builder, and weekly draft automation proposal.
capability_nodes.future_outlook: Reusable weekly update skill that gathers safe evidence, proposes updates, and waits for Kevin approval before public changes.

capability_nodes.label: Social-welfare technology
capability_nodes.need: Translate social-work and citizen-support needs into practical tools, service flows, and decision aids.
capability_nodes.current_spec: Capability map, welfare-resource direction, public-safe directory/report patterns, and HR planning for support roles.
capability_nodes.future_outlook: Separate public information tools from private social-work operating workflows, with clear review and freshness checks.

capability_nodes.label: Citizen finance and life tools
capability_nodes.need: Help general users organize money, risk, resources, and daily-life decisions without turning the tool into expert-only language.
capability_nodes.current_spec: FamilyFin reporting, finance-health tool thinking, plain-language content workflow, and workboard-backed planning signals.
capability_nodes.future_outlook: More citizen-facing workflows that combine resource lookup, financial-life optimization, and content guidance.

capability_nodes.label: Knowledge and research activation
capability_nodes.need: Collect new knowledge, check source quality, turn findings into usable content, tool ideas, and work packets.
capability_nodes.current_spec: Knowledge war-room patterns, content/research fictional pilot, source tables, review rubrics, and field maps.
capability_nodes.future_outlook: A recurring research-to-action lane that produces public-safe briefs and private implementation candidates.

capability_nodes.label: People architecture and HR intelligence
capability_nodes.need: Find partners who reduce Kevin's workload rather than simply adding coordination cost.
capability_nodes.current_spec: HR assessment v0.9 schema, fictional pilots A/B/C, workboard CSV/XLSX, trial task packet, feedback loop, and supervision profile.
capability_nodes.future_outlook: Private-only real-data layer after repo boundary review; public layer remains fictional and explanatory.

capability_nodes.label: Project planning and partner leadership
capability_nodes.need: Move from Kevin personally doing everything toward task packages, gates, training, and handoff ladders.
capability_nodes.current_spec: Workflow responsibility matrix, task package checkpoints, first-partner hiring pack, 30/60/90 handoff framing, and weekly planning card.
capability_nodes.future_outlook: Role-specific onboarding packs and visible delegation map for Kevin / partner / Codex / automation.

capability_nodes.label: Public publishing and governance
capability_nodes.need: Make work explainable across devices while keeping public/internal/restricted boundaries visible.
capability_nodes.current_spec: GitHub-backed Vercel production, noindex controls, production log, redaction scans, governance cards, and proof-oriented verification.
capability_nodes.future_outlook: Every public update keeps noindex, scan proof, source links, and a no-op path when nothing changed.

source_order: Kevin-approved private notes only when explicitly supplied
weekly_update_contract.no_op_rule: If no reliable new material exists, produce a verified no-op with sources checked instead of inventing progress.
